1. import { Wifi, Play, Square, ArrowUpDown } from "lucide-react";
2. import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
3. import { invoke } from "@tauri-apps/api/core";
4. import { useBeaconCapture } from "../hooks/useBeaconCapture";
5. 
6. export function Dashboard() {
7.     const { beacons, isCapturing, startCapture, stopCapture, error } = useBeaconCapture();
8.     const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('desc');
9.     const [monitorIface, setMonitorIface] = useState('wlan0');
10.     const autoStartAttemptedRef = useRef(false);
11. 
12.     useEffect(() => {
13.         invoke<string>('get_monitor_interface').then((iface) => {
14.             setMonitorIface(iface);
15.         }).catch(() => {});
16.     }, []);
17. 
18.     useEffect(() => {
19.         if (autoStartAttemptedRef.current || isCapturing || error) {
20.             return;
21.         }
22. 
23.         autoStartAttemptedRef.current = true;
24.         void startCapture(monitorIface);
25.     }, [error, isCapturing, monitorIface, startCapture]);
26. 
27.     const handleToggleCapture = () => {
28.         if (isCapturing) {
29.             stopCapture();
30.         } else {
31.             startCapture(monitorIface);
32.         }
33.     };
34. 
35.     const sortedNetworks = useMemo(() => {
36.         const list = Array.from(beacons.values());
37.         return list.sort((a, b) => {
38.             if (sortOrder === 'asc') return a.rssi - b.rssi;
39.             return b.rssi - a.rssi;
40.         });
41.     }, [beacons, sortOrder]);
42. 
43.     const toggleSort = () => {
44.         setSortOrder(prev => prev === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc');
45.     };
46. 
47.     return (
48.         <div className="h-full flex flex-col animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">
49.             <header className="mb-8 flex justify-between items-start">
50.                 <div>
51.                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground flex items-center gap-3">
52.                         <Wifi className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
53.                         <span className="text-glow">AETHER</span> <span className="opacity-50 text-muted-foreground font-sans text-2xl font-normal">// DASHBOARD</span>
54.                     </h1>
55.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">Active Monitoring: Interface {monitorIface} (Monitor Mode)</p>
56.                 </div>
57. 
58.                 <button
59.                     onClick={handleToggleCapture}
60.                     className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest border transition-all ${isCapturing
61.                         ? "bg-destructive/10 border-destructive text-destructive hover:bg-destructive hover:text-white"
62.                         : "bg-primary/10 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black"
63.                         }`}
64.                 >
65.                     {isCapturing ? <><Square className="w-4 h-4" /> Stop Capture</> : <><Play className="w-4 h-4" /> Start Capture</>}
66.                 </button>
67.             </header>
68. 
69.             {error && (
70.                 <div className="mb-6 p-4 border border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive rounded-lg font-mono text-sm">
71.                     {error}
72.                 </div>
73.             )}
74. 
75.             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-6">
76.                 {/* Stat Cards */}
77.                 <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group">
78.                     <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-1 h-full bg-border group-hover:bg-primary transition-colors"></div>
79.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Visible Networks</p>
80.                     <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold font-mono text-primary">{beacons.size}</h2>
81.                 </div>
82.                 <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group">
83.                     <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-1 h-full bg-border group-hover:bg-destructive transition-colors"></div>
84.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Channel Congestion</p>
85.                     <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold font-mono text-destructive">
86.                         {beacons.size > 20 ? "High" : beacons.size > 10 ? "Med" : "Low"}
87.                     </h2>
88.                 </div>
89.                 <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group">
90.                     <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-1 h-full bg-border group-hover:bg-radar-green transition-colors"></div>
91.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Unique BSSIDs</p>
92.                     <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold font-mono text-radar-green">{beacons.size}</h2>
93.                 </div>
94.             </div>
95. 
96.             {/* Main Data Table */}
97.             <div className="flex-1 glass-panel rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col border border-border/40">
98.                 <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-border/40 bg-muted/20 flex justify-between items-center">
99.                     <h3 className="font-mono text-sm text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest">Network Intercept Data</h3>
100.                     <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
101.                         <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${isCapturing ? 'bg-radar-green animate-pulse-fast' : 'bg-muted-foreground'}`}></div>
102.                         <span className={`font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider ${isCapturing ? 'text-radar-green' : 'text-muted-foreground'}`}>
103.                             {isCapturing ? 'Live Feed' : 'Offline'}
104.                         </span>
105.                     </div>
106.                 </div>
107.                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto bg-black/20">
108.                     <table className="w-full text-left font-mono text-sm border-collapse">
109.                         <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur z-10 border-b border-border/40">
110.                             <tr>
111.                                 <th className="py-3 px-6 font-normal text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest">BSSID</th>
112.                                 <th className="py-3 px-6 font-normal text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest">SSID</th>
113.                                 <th className="py-3 px-6 font-normal text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest text-center">CH</th>
114.                                 <th
115.                                     className="py-3 px-6 font-normal text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest cursor-pointer hover:text-primary transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 justify-end"
116.                                     onClick={toggleSort}
117.                                 >
118.                                     RSSI (dBm) <ArrowUpDown className="w-3 h-3" />
119.                                 </th>
120.                             </tr>
121.                         </thead>
122.                         <tbody>
123.                             {sortedNetworks.length === 0 ? (
124.                                 <tr>
125.                                     <td colSpan={4} className="py-8 text-center text-muted-foreground italic">
126.                                         {isCapturing ? "Listening for beacons..." : "Start capture to intercept networks."}
127.                                     </td>
128.                                 </tr>
129.                             ) : (
130.                                 sortedNetworks.map((net) => (
131.                                     <tr key={net.bssid} className="border-b border-border/10 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors group">
132.                                         <td className="py-3 px-6 text-foreground/80 group-hover:text-primary transition-colors">{net.bssid}</td>
133.                                         <td className="py-3 px-6">{net.ssid || <span className="opacity-50 italic">&lt;hidden&gt;</span>}</td>
134.                                         <td className="py-3 px-6 text-center text-muted-foreground">{net.channel}</td>
135.                                         <td className="py-3 px-6 text-right">
136.                                             <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3">
137.                                                 <div className="w-16 h-1.5 bg-black rounded-full overflow-hidden">
138.                                                     <div
139.                                                         className={`h-full ${net.rssi > -60 ? 'bg-radar-green' : net.rssi > -80 ? 'bg-primary' : 'bg-destructive'}`}
140.                                                         style={{ width: `${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (net.rssi + 100) * 1.5))}%` }}
141.                                                     />
142.                                                 </div>
143.                                                 <span className={`${net.rssi > -60 ? 'text-radar-green' : net.rssi > -80 ? 'text-primary' : 'text-destructive'} font-bold`}>
144.                                                     {net.rssi}
145.                                                 </span>
146.                                             </div>
147.                                         </td>
148.                                     </tr>
149.                                 ))
150.                             )}
151.                         </tbody>
152.                     </table>
153.                 </div>
154.             </div>
155.         </div>
156.     );
157. }
158.

1. /**
2.  * Aether — Packet Capture Types
3.  *
4.  * TypeScript interfaces matching the Rust `BeaconFrame` and `CaptureStatus`
5.  * structs. These are the payloads received from the Tauri IPC event stream.
6.  *
7.  * @module types/capture
8.  */
9. 
10. /**
11.  * A parsed 802.11 Beacon frame emitted by the Rust packet sniffer.
12.  *
13.  * Received via Tauri event `"beacon-frame"` when a capture session is active.
14.  *
15.  * @example
16.  * ```typescript
17.  * import { listen } from '@tauri-apps/api/event';
18.  * import type { BeaconFrame } from '../types/capture';
19.  *
20.  * const unlisten = await listen<BeaconFrame>('beacon-frame', (event) => {
21.  *   const beacon = event.payload;
22.  *   console.log(`${beacon.ssid} (${beacon.bssid}) CH:${beacon.channel} ${beacon.rssi}dBm`);
23.  * });
24.  * ```
25.  */
26. export interface BeaconFrame {
27.     /** BSSID of the access point (MAC address, e.g. "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF") */
28.     bssid: string;
29. 
30.     /** Network name (SSID). Empty string for hidden networks. */
31.     ssid: string;
32. 
33.     /** WiFi channel number (1–14 for 2.4 GHz, 36–165 for 5 GHz) */
34.     channel: number;
35. 
36.     /** Received Signal Strength Indicator in dBm (e.g. -45). Range: -100 to -20 */
37.     rssi: number;
38. 
39.     /** Frequency in MHz (e.g. 2437 for channel 6) */
40.     frequency_mhz: number;
41. 
42.     /** Vendor name from OUI lookup, or null if unknown */
43.     vendor: string | null;
44. 
45.     /** Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this frame was captured */
46.     timestamp_ms: number;
47. }
48. 
49. /**
50.  * Status payload returned by `start_capture` / `stop_capture` Tauri commands.
````

```
1. import { Activity, Play, Square } from "lucide-react";
2. import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react";
3. import { useBeaconCapture } from "../hooks/useBeaconCapture";
4. import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
5. 
6. export function Spectrum() {
7.     const { beacons, isCapturing, startCapture, stopCapture } = useBeaconCapture();
8.     const [band, setBand] = useState<'2.4' | '5' | '6'>('2.4');
9. 
10.     const handleToggleCapture = () => {
11.         if (isCapturing) stopCapture();
12.         else startCapture('wlan0'); // adjust as needed
13.     };
14. 
15.     // Prepare ECharts Options perfectly memoized
16.     const chartOptions = useMemo(() => {
17.         const beaconList = Array.from(beacons.values());
18. 
19.         let minX = 0, maxX = 15;
20.         if (band === '5') { minX = 30; maxX = 170; }
21.         else if (band === '6') { minX = 0; maxX = 240; }
22. 
23.         const series = beaconList.map((b) => {
24.             let ch = b.channel;
25.             // Basic band filtering based on channel number ranges
26.             if (band === '2.4' && ch > 14) return null;
27.             if (band === '5' && (ch <= 14 || ch > 170)) return null;
28.             if (band === '6' && ch < 1) return null; // Approximation
29. 
30.             // Width of curve: ~2 for 2.4GHz, varying for others
31.             const width = band === '2.4' ? 2 : 4;
32. 
33.             return {
34.                 name: b.ssid || b.bssid,
35.                 type: 'line',
36.                 smooth: true,
37.                 showSymbol: false,
38.                 lineStyle: { width: 2 },
39.                 areaStyle: { opacity: 0.1 },
40.                 data: [
41.                     [ch - width, -100],
42.                     [ch - width / 2, b.rssi - 15],
43.                     [ch, b.rssi],
44.                     [ch + width / 2, b.rssi - 15],
45.                     [ch + width, -100]
46.                 ]
47.             };
48.         }).filter(Boolean);
49. 
50.         return {
51.             backgroundColor: 'transparent',
52.             tooltip: {
53.                 trigger: 'item',
54.                 formatter: (params: any) => {
55.                     return `<b>${params.seriesName}</b><br/>Channel: ${params.value[0]}<br/>RSSI: ${params.value[1]} dBm`;
56.                 }
57.             },
58.             xAxis: {
59.                 type: 'value',
60.                 min: minX,
61.                 max: maxX,
62.                 name: 'Channel',
63.                 nameLocation: 'middle',
64.                 nameGap: 25,
65.                 axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#444' } },
66.                 axisLabel: { color: '#888' },
67.                 splitLine: { show: false }
68.             },
69.             yAxis: {
70.                 type: 'value',
71.                 min: -100,
72.                 max: -20,
73.                 name: 'RSSI (dBm)',
74.                 nameLocation: 'middle',
75.                 nameGap: 35,
76.                 axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#444' } },
77.                 axisLabel: { color: '#888' },
78.                 splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#222', type: 'dashed' } }
79.             },
80.             series: series,
81.             animation: false // Disable default animation for fluid updates
82.         };
83.     }, [beacons, band]);
84. 
85.     return (
86.         <div className="h-full flex flex-col animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">
87.             <header className="mb-8 flex justify-between items-start">
88.                 <div>
89.                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground flex items-center gap-3">
90.                         <span className="text-glow">SPECTRUM</span> <span className="opacity-50 text-muted-foreground font-sans text-2xl font-normal">// 2.4GHz & 5GHz</span>
91.                     </h1>
92.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">Real-time Topology Analysis</p>
93.                 </div>
94.                 <button
95.                     onClick={handleToggleCapture}
96.                     className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest border transition-all ${isCapturing
97.                         ? "bg-destructive/10 border-destructive text-destructive hover:bg-destructive hover:text-white"
98.                         : "bg-primary/10 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black"
99.                         }`}
100.                 >
101.                     {isCapturing ? <><Square className="w-4 h-4" /> Stop Capture</> : <><Play className="w-4 h-4" /> Start Capture</>}
102.                 </button>
103.             </header>
104. 
105.             <div className="flex-1 glass-panel rounded-xl border border-border/40 p-6 flex flex-col">
106.                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 border-b border-border/40 pb-4">
107.                     <div className="flex gap-4">
108.                         <button
109.                             onClick={() => setBand('2.4')}
110.                             className={`px-4 py-1 text-xs font-mono tracking-widest uppercase border rounded transition-colors ${band === '2.4' ? 'border-primary text-primary bg-primary/10' : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'}`}
111.                         >
112.                             2.4 GHz
113.                         </button>
114.                         <button
115.                             onClick={() => setBand('5')}
116.                             className={`px-4 py-1 text-xs font-mono tracking-widest uppercase border rounded transition-colors ${band === '5' ? 'border-primary text-primary bg-primary/10' : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'}`}
117.                         >
118.                             5 GHz
119.                         </button>
120.                         <button
121.                             onClick={() => setBand('6')}
122.                             className={`px-4 py-1 text-xs font-mono tracking-widest uppercase border rounded transition-colors ${band === '6' ? 'border-primary text-primary bg-primary/10' : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'}`}
123.                         >
124.                             6 GHz
125.                         </button>
126.                     </div>
127.                     <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${isCapturing ? 'text-primary' : 'text-muted-foreground'}`}>
128.                         <Activity className={`w-4 h-4 ${isCapturing ? 'animate-pulse' : ''}`} />
129.                         {isCapturing ? 'Scanning' : 'Offline'}
130.                     </div>
131.                 </div>
132.                 <div className="flex-1 border border-border/20 rounded-lg bg-black/20 flex items-center justify-center p-2">
133.                     <ReactECharts
134.                         option={chartOptions}
135.                         style={{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }}
136.                         notMerge={false}
137.                         lazyUpdate={true}
138.                     />
139.                 </div>
140.             </div>
141.         </div>
142.     );
143. }
144.
```

1. import { Crosshair, Radio, Square } from "lucide-react";
2. import ReactECharts from "echarts-for-react";
3. import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
4. import { useBeaconCapture } from "../hooks/useBeaconCapture";
5. 
6. export function Hunt() {
7.     const [targetMac, setTargetMac] = useState("");
8.     const [channelLock, setChannelLock] = useState("Auto-Scan");
9.     const { beaconStream, isCapturing, startCapture, stopCapture } = useBeaconCapture();
10. 
11.     const handleToggleCapture = () => {
12.         if (isCapturing) stopCapture();
13.         else startCapture('wlan0'); // default capturing interface
14.     };
15. 
16.     const cleanMac = targetMac.trim().toLowerCase();
17. 
18.     // Data specifically for the target MAC
19.     const targetData = useMemo(() => {
20.         if (!cleanMac) return [];
21.         return beaconStream.filter(b => b.bssid.toLowerCase() === cleanMac);
22.     }, [beaconStream, cleanMac]);
23. 
24.     const latestRssi = targetData.length > 0 ? targetData[targetData.length - 1].rssi : null;
25. 
26.     const chartOptions = useMemo(() => {
27.         const now = Date.now();
28.         const sixtySecondsAgo = now - 60000;
29. 
30.         // Map data to x,y format, only keeping last 60 seconds
31.         const seriesData = targetData
32.             .filter(b => b.timestamp_ms >= sixtySecondsAgo)
33.             .map(b => [b.timestamp_ms, b.rssi]);
34. 
35.         return {
36.             backgroundColor: 'transparent',
37.             tooltip: { trigger: 'axis' },
38.             xAxis: {
39.                 type: 'time',
40.                 min: sixtySecondsAgo,
41.                 max: now,
42.                 splitLine: { show: false },
43.                 axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#444' } },
44.                 axisLabel: { color: '#888', formatter: '{mm}:{ss}' }
45.             },
46.             yAxis: {
47.                 type: 'value',
48.                 min: -100,
49.                 max: -20,
50.                 name: 'RSSI (dBm)',
51.                 splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#ef4444', opacity: 0.1 } },
52.                 axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#444' } },
53.                 axisLabel: { color: '#ef4444' }
54.             },
55.             series: [{
56.                 name: 'Target RSSI',
57.                 type: 'line',
58.                 smooth: true,
59.                 showSymbol: false,
60.                 lineStyle: { width: 3, color: '#ef4444' },
61.                 areaStyle: {
62.                     color: {
63.                         type: 'linear', x: 0, y: 0, x2: 0, y2: 1,
64.                         colorStops: [{ offset: 0, color: 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.5)' }, { offset: 1, color: 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0)' }]
65.                     }
66.                 },
67.                 data: seriesData
68.             }],
69.             animation: false
70.         };
71.     }, [targetData]);
72. 
73.     return (
74.         <div className="h-full flex flex-col animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">
75.             <header className="mb-8 flex justify-between items-start">
76.                 <div>
77.                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground flex items-center gap-3">
78.                         <Crosshair className="w-8 h-8 text-destructive" />
79.                         <span className="text-glow text-destructive">HUNT</span> <span className="opacity-50 text-muted-foreground font-sans text-2xl font-normal">// TARGETED TRACKING</span>
80.                     </h1>
81.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">RSSI Tracker & Direction Finding</p>
82.                 </div>
83.             </header>
84. 
85.             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 h-full">
86.                 {/* Sidebar Settings / Target Selector */}
87.                 <div className="lg:col-span-1 glass-panel rounded-xl p-6 border border-border/40 flex flex-col gap-6">
88.                     <div>
89.                         <label className="text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground mb-2 block">Target MAC</label>
90.                         <input
91.                             type="text"
92.                             placeholder="00:11:22:33:44:55"
93.                             value={targetMac}
94.                             onChange={(e) => setTargetMac(e.target.value)}
95.                             className="w-full bg-black/40 border border-border/60 rounded px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm text-primary focus:border-primary focus:outline-none transition-colors uppercase"
96.                         />
97.                     </div>
98.                     <div>
99.                         <label className="text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground mb-2 block">Lock Channel</label>
100.                         <select
101.                             value={channelLock}
102.                             onChange={(e) => setChannelLock(e.target.value)}
103.                             className="w-full bg-black/40 border border-border/60 rounded px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm text-foreground focus:border-primary focus:outline-none transition-colors appearance-none"
104.                         >
105.                             <option>Auto-Scan</option>
106.                             <option>CH 1 (2.4GHz)</option>
107.                             <option>CH 6 (2.4GHz)</option>
108.                             <option>CH 11 (2.4GHz)</option>
109.                         </select>
110.                     </div>
111.                     <button
112.                         onClick={handleToggleCapture}
113.                         className={`mt-auto w-full transition-all rounded py-3 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${isCapturing
114.                             ? "bg-destructive border border-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/80"
115.                             : "bg-destructive/10 border border-destructive/50 text-destructive hover:bg-destructive hover:text-destructive-foreground"
116.                             }`}
117.                     >
118.                         {isCapturing ? <><Square className="w-4 h-4" /> Disengage</> : <><Radio className="w-4 h-4" /> Engage Tracker</>}
119.                     </button>
120.                 </div>
121. 
122.                 {/* Main Radar Graph */}
123.                 <div className="lg:col-span-3 glass-panel rounded-xl border border-destructive/30 p-6 flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden">
124.                     {/* Background Scanner Effect */}
125.                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,rgba(239,68,68,0.05)_0%,transparent_70%)] pointer-events-none"></div>
126. 
127.                     <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6 z-10">
128.                         <h3 className="font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-destructive">Signal Strength (dBm)</h3>
129.                         <span className="font-mono text-3xl font-bold text-destructive">
130.                             {latestRssi !== null ? latestRssi : "- --"}
131.                         </span>
132.                     </div>
133. 
134.                     <div className="flex-1 bg-black/40 border border-border/20 rounded relative z-10 p-2">
135.                         {!cleanMac ? (
136.                             <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
137.                                 <div className="w-32 h-32 rounded-full border border-destructive/20 flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden mb-4">
138.                                     <div className="absolute w-full h-[1px] bg-destructive/40 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 animate-pulse-fast pointer-events-none"></div>
139.                                     <div className="absolute h-full w-[1px] bg-destructive/40 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 animate-pulse-fast pointer-events-none"></div>
140.                                 </div>
141.                                 <span className="font-mono text-sm text-destructive/50 uppercase tracking-widest">No Target MAC Specified</span>
142.                             </div>
143.                         ) : (
144.                             <ReactECharts
145.                                 option={chartOptions}
146.                                 style={{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }}
147.                                 notMerge={true}
148.                                 lazyUpdate={true}
149.                             />
150.                         )}
151.                     </div>
152.                 </div>
153.             </div>
154.         </div>
155.     );
156. }
157.
```

</details>

1. /**
2.  * Aether — Settings Page
3.  *
4.  * Provides interface management: list adapters, toggle monitor/managed mode,
5.  * and configure the active capture interface.
6.  */
7. 
8. import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
9. import { invoke } from "@tauri-apps/api/core";
10. import {
11.     Settings2, RefreshCw, Wifi, WifiOff, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight,
12.     ChevronRight, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle2, Radio
13. } from "lucide-react";
14. import type { NetworkInterface, InterfaceModeResult } from "../types/capture";
15. 
16. export function SettingsPage() {
17.     const [interfaces, setInterfaces] = useState<NetworkInterface[]>([]);
18.     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
19.     const [toggleLoading, setToggleLoading] = useState<string | null>(null);
20.     const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
21.     const [lastResult, setLastResult] = useState<InterfaceModeResult | null>(null);
22. 
23.     const fetchInterfaces = useCallback(async () => {
24.         setLoading(true);
25.         setError(null);
26.         try {
27.             const ifaces = await invoke<NetworkInterface[]>("list_interfaces");
28.             setInterfaces(ifaces);
29.         } catch (err: unknown) {
30.             const msg = typeof err === "string" ? err : JSON.stringify(err);
31.             setError(msg);
32.         } finally {
33.             setLoading(false);
34.         }
35.     }, []);
36. 
37.     useEffect(() => {
38.         fetchInterfaces();
39.     }, [fetchInterfaces]);
40. 
41.     const handleToggleMode = async (ifaceName: string) => {
42.         setToggleLoading(ifaceName);
43.         setError(null);
44.         setLastResult(null);
45. 
46.         try {
47.             const result = await invoke<InterfaceModeResult>("toggle_interface_mode", {
48.                 interfaceName: ifaceName,
49.             });
50.             setLastResult(result);
51.             // Refresh the interface list to show updated mode
52.             await fetchInterfaces();
53.         } catch (err: unknown) {
54.             const msg = typeof err === "string" ? err : JSON.stringify(err);
55.             setError(msg);
56.         } finally {
57.             setToggleLoading(null);
58.         }
59.     };
60. 
61.     const wireless = interfaces.filter(i => i.is_wireless);
62.     const wired = interfaces.filter(i => !i.is_wireless);
63. 
64.     return (
65.         <div className="h-full flex flex-col animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">
66.             <header className="mb-6 flex justify-between items-start">
67.                 <div>
68.                     <h1 className="text-3xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground flex items-center gap-3">
69.                         <Settings2 className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
70.                         <span className="text-glow">SETTINGS</span>{" "}
71.                         <span className="opacity-50 text-muted-foreground font-sans text-2xl font-normal">// INTERFACES</span>
72.                     </h1>
73.                     <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">
74.                         Adapter Management & Mode Control
75.                     </p>
76.                 </div>
77.                 <button
78.                     onClick={fetchInterfaces}
79.                     disabled={loading}
80.                     className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest border border-primary/50 text-primary bg-primary/10 hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-all disabled:opacity-30"
81.                 >
82.                     <RefreshCw className={`w-4 h-4 ${loading ? "animate-spin" : ""}`} />
83.                     Refresh
84.                 </button>
85.             </header>
86. 
87.             {/* Result Banner */}
88.             {lastResult && (
89.                 <div className={`mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg font-mono text-xs flex items-center gap-2 border ${lastResult.success ? "border-radar-green/50 bg-radar-green/10 text-radar-green" : "border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive"}`}>
90.                     {lastResult.success ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0" /> : <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0" />}
91.                     {lastResult.message}
92.                 </div>
93.             )}
94. 
95.             {error && (
96.                 <div className="mb-4 p-3 border border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive rounded-lg font-mono text-xs flex items-center gap-2">
97.                     <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0" />
98.                     {error}
99.                 </div>
100.             )}
101. 
102.             <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto space-y-6">
103.                 {/* Wireless Interfaces */}
104.                 <section>
105.                     <h2 className="font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-primary mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
106.                         <Wifi className="w-4 h-4" />
107.                         Wireless Adapters ({wireless.length})
108.                     </h2>
109.                     {wireless.length === 0 ? (
110.                         <div className="glass-panel rounded-xl border border-border/40 p-8 text-center">
111.                             <WifiOff className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mx-auto mb-3" />
112.                             <p className="font-mono text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest">No wireless adapters detected</p>
113.                             <p className="font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/60 mt-1">Check the Environment Doctor for setup instructions.</p>
114.                         </div>
115.                     ) : (
116.                         <div className="space-y-2">
117.                             {wireless.map((iface) => (
118.                                 <div key={iface.name} className="glass-panel rounded-xl border border-border/40 p-4 flex items-center gap-4 group hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors">
119.                                     <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center ${iface.mode === "monitor" ? "bg-radar-green/10 text-radar-green" : "bg-primary/10 text-primary"}`}>
120.                                         <Radio className="w-5 h-5" />
121.                                     </div>
122.                                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
123.                                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
124.                                             <span className="font-mono text-sm font-bold text-foreground">{iface.name}</span>
125.                                             <span className={`font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${iface.mode === "monitor" ? "bg-radar-green/10 text-radar-green border border-radar-green/30" : "bg-primary/10 text-primary border border-primary/30"}`}>
126.                                                 {iface.mode}
127.                                             </span>
128.                                             {iface.is_up && <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-radar-green" />}
129.                                         </div>
130.                                         <div className="font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1 flex gap-4">
131.                                             {iface.mac_address && <span>MAC: {iface.mac_address}</span>}
132.                                             {iface.driver && <span>Driver: {iface.driver}</span>}
133.                                             {iface.phy && <span>PHY: {iface.phy}</span>}
134.                                         </div>
135.                                     </div>
136.                                     <button
137.                                         onClick={() => handleToggleMode(iface.name)}
138.                                         disabled={toggleLoading === iface.name}
139.                                         className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest border transition-all ${iface.mode === "monitor"
140.                                                 ? "border-primary/40 text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black"
141.                                                 : "border-radar-green/40 text-radar-green hover:bg-radar-green hover:text-black"
142.                                             } disabled:opacity-30`}
143.                                     >
144.                                         {toggleLoading === iface.name ? (
145.                                             <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />
146.                                         ) : iface.mode === "monitor" ? (
147.                                             <ToggleRight className="w-4 h-4" />
148.                                         ) : (
149.                                             <ToggleLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
150.                                         )}
151.                                         {iface.mode === "monitor" ? "Set Managed" : "Set Monitor"}
152.                                     </button>
153.                                 </div>
154.                             ))}
155.                         </div>
156.                     )}
157.                 </section>
158. 
159.                 {/* Wired / Other Interfaces */}
160.                 {wired.length > 0 && (
161.                     <section>
162.                         <h2 className="font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
163.                             <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
164.                             Other Interfaces ({wired.length})
165.                         </h2>
166.                         <div className="space-y-2">
167.                             {wired.map((iface) => (
168.                                 <div key={iface.name} className="glass-panel rounded-xl border border-border/20 p-3 flex items-center gap-3 opacity-60">
169.                                     <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-muted/30 flex items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground">
170.                                         <Wifi className="w-4 h-4" />
171.                                     </div>
172.                                     <div className="flex-1">
173.                                         <span className="font-mono text-xs text-foreground/70">{iface.name}</span>
174.                                         <div className="font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground flex gap-3 mt-0.5">
175.                                             {iface.mac_address && <span>{iface.mac_address}</span>}
176.                                             <span>{iface.is_up ? "UP" : "DOWN"}</span>
177.                                         </div>
178.                                     </div>
179.                                 </div>
180.                             ))}
181.                         </div>
182.                     </section>
183.                 )}
184.             </div>
185.         </div>
186.     );
187. }
188.
```

1. @import "tailwindcss";
2. @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');
3. @import "tw-animate-css";
4. @import "shadcn/tailwind.css";
5. 
6. @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));
7. 
8. @theme inline {
9.   --font-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
10.   --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
11. 
12.   --color-sidebar-ring: var(--sidebar-ring);
13.   --color-sidebar-border: var(--sidebar-border);
14.   --color-sidebar-accent-foreground: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground);
15.   --color-sidebar-accent: var(--sidebar-accent);
16.   --color-sidebar-primary-foreground: var(--sidebar-primary-foreground);
17.   --color-sidebar-primary: var(--sidebar-primary);
18.   --color-sidebar-foreground: var(--sidebar-foreground);
19.   --color-sidebar: var(--sidebar);
20.   --color-chart-5: var(--chart-5);
21.   --color-chart-4: var(--chart-4);
22.   --color-chart-3: var(--chart-3);
23.   --color-chart-2: var(--chart-2);

<sub>⏱️ 235m 24s</sub>

### ✅ `bash`

**Write new Sidebar**

$ cat > /home/kali/Aether_wifi/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx << 'EOF'
import {
  Activity, Target, Shield, LayoutDashboard, Terminal, Stethoscope,
  Settings2, Radar, Zap, Eye, Wrench,
} from "lucide-react";
import { Link, useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from "../ui/tooltip";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const NAV_ITEMS = [
    { id: "dashboard", icon: LayoutDashboard, label: "Dashboard", path: "/" },
    { id: "spectrum", icon: Activity, label: "Spectrum", path: "/spectrum" },
    { id: "hunt", icon: Target, label: "Hunt Mode", path: "/hunt" },
    { id: "audit", icon: Shield, label: "Audit Suite", path: "/audit" },
    { id: "recon", icon: Radar, label: "Recon", path: "/recon" },
    { id: "attack", icon: Zap, label: "Attack", path: "/attack" },
    { id: "sniffer", icon: Eye, label: "Sniffer", path: "/sniffer" },
    { id: "tools", icon: Wrench, label: "Tools", path: "/tools" },
    { id: "doctor", icon: Stethoscope, label: "Env Doctor", path: "/doctor" },
    { id: "settings", icon: Settings2, label: "Settings", path: "/settings" },
];

export function Sidebar() {
    const location = useLocation();

    return (
        <aside className="w-14 h-screen flex flex-col items-center py-4 border-r bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl shrink-0 z-50 overflow-hidden">
            <div className="mb-6 text-primary">
                <Terminal className="w-6 h-6" strokeWidth={1.5} />
            </div>

            <nav className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-1 w-full px-1.5">
                <TooltipProvider delayDuration={0}>
                    {NAV_ITEMS.map((item) => {
                        const isActive = location.pathname === item.path;
                        const Icon = item.icon;

                        return (
                            <Tooltip key={item.id}>
                                <TooltipTrigger asChild>
                                    <Link
                                        to={item.path}
                                        className={cn(
                                            "w-11 h-11 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg transition-all relative",
                                            isActive
                                                ? "bg-primary/15 text-primary"
                                                : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground"
                                        )}
                                    >
                                        {isActive && (
                                            <div className="absolute left-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[3px] h-5 bg-primary rounded-r-full" />
                                        )}
                                        <Icon className="w-4.5 h-4.5" strokeWidth={isActive ? 2 : 1.5} />
                                    </Link>
                                </TooltipTrigger>
                                <TooltipContent side="right" sideOffset={8} className="font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider">
                                    {item.label}
                                </TooltipContent>
                            </Tooltip>
                        );
                    })}
                </TooltipProvider>
            </nav>

            <div className="mt-auto px-2">
                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-secondary flex items-center justify-center">
                    <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-radar-green animate-pulse" />
                </div>
            </div>
        </aside>
    );
}
EOF

**Write new App.tsx**

$ cat > /home/kali/Aether_wifi/src/App.tsx << 'EOF'
import { Routes, Route } from "react-router-dom";
import { AppShell } from "./components/layout/AppShell";
import { Dashboard } from "./pages/Dashboard";
import { Spectrum } from "./pages/Spectrum";
import { Hunt } from "./pages/Hunt";
import { Audit } from "./pages/Audit";
import { EnvironmentDoctor } from "./pages/EnvironmentDoctor";
import { SettingsPage } from "./pages/Settings";
import { Recon } from "./pages/Recon";
import { Attack } from "./pages/Attack";
import { Sniffer } from "./pages/Sniffer";
import { Tools } from "./pages/Tools";
import { BeaconCaptureProvider } from "./hooks/useBeaconCapture";

function App() {
  return (
    <BeaconCaptureProvider>
      <AppShell>
        <Routes>
          <Route path="/" element={<Dashboard />} />
          <Route path="/spectrum" element={<Spectrum />} />
          <Route path="/hunt" element={<Hunt />} />
          <Route path="/audit" element={<Audit />} />
          <Route path="/recon" element={<Recon />} />
          <Route path="/attack" element={<Attack />} />
          <Route path="/sniffer" element={<Sniffer />} />
          <Route path="/tools" element={<Tools />} />
          <Route path="/doctor" element={<EnvironmentDoctor />} />
          <Route path="/settings" element={<SettingsPage />} />
        </Routes>
      </AppShell>
    </BeaconCaptureProvider>
  );
}

export default App;
EOF

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#  AETHER WiFi Auditor — One-Command Launcher
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#
#  Usage:

#

#    AETHER_RESTORE_MANAGED=0 bash ./aether.sh
#
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

set -euo pipefail

IFACE="${AETHER_IFACE:-wlan0}"
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_DIR="${AETHER_PROJECT_DIR:-$SCRIPT_DIR}"
RESTORE_MANAGED="${AETHER_RESTORE_MANAGED:-1}"
NEEDS_CLEANUP=0
NETWORKMANAGER_WAS_ACTIVE=0
WPASUPPLICANT_WAS_ACTIVE=0
INITIAL_CHANNEL=""

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

service_is_active() {
    local service="$1"
    command -v systemctl &>/dev/null && systemctl is-active --quiet "$service"
}

restore_interface_state() {
    if [ "$RESTORE_MANAGED" != "1" ] || [ "$NEEDS_CLEANUP" -ne 1 ]; then
        return
    fi

<sub>⏱️ 244m 25s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

The `iw dev wlan0 info` fails because there's no wlan0 — this runs with `set -euo pipefail` and `pipefail` catches the `iw` failure. But actually the issue is that line 100 has `2\>/dev/null` but `pipefail` makes the pipeline fail. Let me check if wlan0 exists:

---

No WiFi adapter connected to the VM right now — that's why it exits at the interface check. The USB adapter probably isn't passed through to VMware currently.

<sub>⏱️ 244m 55s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Vite is running on **http://localhost:1420/**. Open that in Firefox on the VM and you'll see the full shadcn UI with all the new pages in the sidebar (Dashboard, Spectrum, Hunt, Audit, Recon, Attack, Sniffer, Tools, Doctor, Settings).

Note: The Tauri backend commands won't work in browser mode (they need the Tauri runtime), but you can see all the UI layouts, navigation, and styling. The WiFi adapter isn't connected to the VM right now — that's why `aether.sh` exits. Once you passthrough the USB adapter in VMware, we can launch the full app.

Go check it out at **http://localhost:1420** and let me know what you think!
